title: DistExpectTol Property
description:
DistExpectTol Property

DistExpectTol Property

This property sets the range that is the success condition of the moving distance (when the operation is finished) from the operation start position.

The success condition is the range of

DistExpected - DistExpected

to DistExpected + DistExpected

Value

Minimum value 0.01

Maximum value 10

Default: 1
